recommendations.title: Magic
recommendations.overview: A ventriloquist is at the mercy of his vicious dummy while he tries to renew a romance with his high school sweetheart.

recommendations.title: Shadowlands
recommendations.overview: C.S. Lewis, a world-renowned writer and professor, leads a passionless life until he meets spirited poet Joy Gresham.

recommendations.title: Chaplin
recommendations.overview: An aged Charlie Chaplin narrates his life to his autobiography's editor, including his rise to wealth and comedic fame from poverty, his turbulent personal life and his run-ins with the FBI.

recommendations.title: In Love and War
recommendations.overview: After teenage ambulance driver Ernest Hemingway takes shrapnel in the leg during World War I, he falls in love with Agnes von Kurowsky, a beautiful older nurse at the hospital where he's sent to recover. Their affair slowly blossoms, until Hemingway

recommendations.title: Gandhi

recommendations.title: Cry Freedom
recommendations.overview: A dramatic story, based on actual events, about the friendship between two men struggling against apartheid in South Africa in the 1970s. Donald Woods is a white liberal journalist in South Africa who begins to follow the activities of Stephen Biko,

recommendations.title: Shutter Island
recommendations.overview: World War II soldier-turned-U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels investigates the disappearance of a patient from a hospital for the criminally insane, but his efforts are compromised by troubling visions and a mysterious doctor.

recommendations.title: A Bridge Too Far

recommendations.title: Stand by Me

recommendations.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
